title: Danone CEO flags price uncertainty as Iran war escalates: ‘Nobody knows' how conflict will play out
summary_full: Consumer goods companies increasingly take stock of how the Iran war may impact their operations and costs base, as the conflict enters its sixth week.
summary_public: Consumer goods companies increasingly take stock of how the Iran war may impact their operations and costs base, as the conflict enters its sixth week.
